title: QA
pitfalls: Build flow skipped top-level guide/rule artifacts for migration compatibility
Non-interactive init fallback dropped subsequent answers across multi-step prompts
Legacy AGENTS.md marker was not upgraded to full AIDA guidance during migration/build
Indented conflict markers in custom *.rules.json caused merge parsing failure or empty-array fallback
currentTaskId remains pinned to a completed task after aida_task_done even when other tasks are still in progress
migrate-legacy fails on module memory write when module key contains slash such as CLI/MCP
